title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Haribhakti & Co - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Haribhakti & Co - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Haribhakti & Co are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Haribhakti & Co:
Haribhakti & Co is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haribhakti & Co!
